title: Securing information
doc_html:
§1310.14. Securing information

            Every employer shall furnish the assistant secretary, upon request, any information required by him to carry out the provisions of the Worker's Compensation Act.

            Acts 1988, No. 938, §2, eff. July 1, 1989; Acts 1989, No. 260, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1990.
